title: Bitcoin miner Hut 8 gets $150 million investment from Coatue to advance AI infrastructure market
text: Bitcoin miner Hut 8 received a $150 million investment from Coatue to advance its AI infrastructure market presence. The investment demonstrates the confidence major tech investors have in Hut 8's transition from Bitcoin mining to AI data center operations. Strategic Significance: The investment provides Hut 8 with capital to build out AI data center infrastructure and positions the company as a key player in the competitive AI compute market. The deal validates Hut 8's strategy of leveraging its energy infrastructure capabilities to serve emerging AI workloads. Market Context: Coatue's investment reflects broader industry trends as large technology funds recognize the immense capital requirements and infrastructure advantages needed to serve AI training and inference workloads. Coatue's experience in infrastructure and AI verticals makes it an ideal partner for Hut 8's expansion plans. Financial Terms: The convertible note features an 8% annual interest rate and an initial conversion price of $16.395 per share, representing a 45% premium to the volume-weighted average price at the time of announcement.
